ROBBERY TEAM Abhi 30 min me sham ko hone wali robbery ke liye team banani hai to apna ya to meri team me ho jao ya shadow ki team me at least game level 6 ke uper wale ya to game me aao ya apna name yahi per bhejdo jiski team me Jana ho lekin dhyan rahe family rank 5 walon ki baat nhi kar raha mai unlogon ki baat kar raha hu jinka personal level atleast 6 ho. Jo log ye kaam na kare wo stream me robbery ke time paas na aye nhi to maar diya jayega chahe hamari family ka hi ho. @everyone Jo Team Abhi Banegi wahi Robbery me Jayegi, koi new add nhi hoga baad me, so make sure abhi se sab settle ho jaaye. Apka personal level, apke passport me 6 Ya us se Upar Hona chahiye. Aap apna name yha bhej do ya fir direct game me bta do. Baki jo Level 5 hai, unke liye bhi kuch plan hai, jo Mai Personally apko stream time me game me btaunga.

@everyone Jaisa Vaibhav ne btaya, GUN ka jugad ho jayega, make sure aapne Black Market se Assault ki ammo buy ki hui ho. ONE VERY IMPORTANT POINT: Game me M>Stats>Skills me jaake apna Assault ka skill ya to Gun chala ke badhao ya fir Buy kar ke, Us se damage badh jayega. Ho sake to Gun Paint bhi lga lena (Gun Skin) to increase the damage.
